title: Fairphone 3/3+ Android 13 (6.A.022.1) Update
description:
Software 6.A.022.1 is available for your Fairphone 3 or Fairphone 3+.
This system update includes the following changes:

Resolved issues
  • Ringing tone can be heard on outgoing phone calls.
  • Customising your Wallpaper & Style using My Photos no longer crashes.
  • Faster SIM card unlock for users entering their PIN after reboot.
  • Sound Recorder app recording issue is now solved.
  • Manual network selection, which was unavailable on certain networks, is now available again.
Other improvements
  • Security patch level: 5th of October, 2023

More information


Note that it may take some time for the update process to complete. It will not be possible to use your device during this time. This includes not being able to make emergency calls.

Please note that data charges may apply.
